content: Ship-page HTML edits are per-ship Read + Edit only — never sed -i, awk, or scripts that write HTML. The pre-commit chain (.githooks/pre-commit: ship-lock.cjs -> check-ship-regression.cjs -> check-image-reuse.cjs) is a safety net, not a license to bulk-script. Subagents are fine for read-only research, not for bulk HTML edits the operator expects hands-on verification of. Both violations happened on 2026-05-13 and were confessed under the careful-or-clever audit.
